assertions.text: Questions phrased as a journalist would ask them
Dont-know-yet positions acknowledged with bridging language
No answer contains information not grounded in the input

journalist-register.note: Questions blunt: Did any local authority lose data? How long before you noticed?

dont-know-acknowledged.note: Cannot name authorities answer has bridging: we are notifying each authority individually

no-ungrounded-info.note: All answers grounded in input facts only

journalist-register.note: Direct journalist questions: How much money? What was the employees role?

dont-know-acknowledged.note: Specific allegations answer has bridging: cooperating with police, cannot comment on details

no-ungrounded-info.note: No information beyond what was provided

journalist-register.note: Questions in journalist register: Did you know about data quality before? Could patients have been harmed?

dont-know-acknowledged.note: Treatment protocol question has bridging: review must complete before we can comment on specifics

no-ungrounded-info.note: All answers grounded in the briefing input
